title: Richly Gooey Tunisian Beef Stir-fry
description: This rich and velvety dish features a blend of red wine jelly, roasted beef, and other festive ingredients in a perfect keto-friendly meal.
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C). Season beef with salt and black pepper.
Roast beef in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes or until desired doneness is reached. Let rest for a few minutes before slicing thinly.
Dice onions and tomatoes. Mince garlic cloves.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add sliced beef to the pan, letting it sear on each side for about 2 minutes per side. Remove from heat to keep warm if needed.
Stir together red wine jelly with diced onions and tomatoes in a saucepan. Simmer over low-medium heat until thickened, about 10-15 minutes.
Combine beef slices with the tomato-jelly mixture in a large serving bowl or plate. Serve hot as a festive keto-friendly dinner.
